glosses.ja: 到着する; 達成する

sentences.target: Ich kann dich gerade nicht erreichen.

translations.de: Ich kann dich gerade nicht erreichen.
translations.en: I can't reach you right now.
translations.es: Ahora mismo no puedo comunicarme contigo.
translations.fr: Je n'arrive pas à te joindre en ce moment.
translations.ru: Я сейчас не могу до тебя дозвониться.
translations.he: אני לא מצליח להשיג אותך עכשיו.
translations.vi: Bây giờ tôi không liên lạc được với bạn.
translations.nl: Ik kan je nu niet bereiken.
translations.uk: Я зараз не можу до тебе додзвонитися.
translations.hi: मैं अभी आपसे संपर्क नहीं कर पा रहा हूँ.
translations.pl: Nie mogę się teraz do ciebie dodzwonić.
translations.el: Δεν μπορώ να σε βρω τώρα.
translations.nb: Jeg får ikke tak i deg nå.
translations.sv: Jag får inte tag på dig just nu.
translations.ro: Nu pot să dau de tine acum.
translations.da: Jeg kan ikke få fat i dig lige nu.
translations.ja: 今はあなたに連絡が取れません。

tokens.explanation: Personal pronoun, 1st person singular nominative; subject of the clause.
Modal auxiliary (present, finite) expressing ability; selects a bare infinitive complement.
Personal pronoun, 2nd person singular accusative; direct object (person to be reached).
Adverb of time; focuses the statement on the present moment.
Negation particle; negates the predicate.
Lexical verb in bare infinitive (selected by the modal); denotes contacting or reaching someone.

sentences.target: Wir müssen den Zug noch erreichen.

translations.de: Wir müssen den Zug noch erreichen.
translations.en: We still have to catch the train.
translations.es: Todavía tenemos que tomar el tren.
translations.fr: On doit encore attraper le train.
translations.zh-Hans: 我们还得赶上那趟火车。
translations.yue: 我哋仲要趕上嗰班火車。
translations.ru: Нам ещё нужно успеть на поезд.
translations.vi: Chúng ta vẫn phải kịp chuyến tàu.
translations.ar: ما زלنا بحاجة إلى أن نלحق بالقطار.
translations.nl: We moeten de trein nog halen.
translations.uk: Нам ще треба встигнути на поїзд.
translations.hu: Még el kell érnünk a vonatot.
translations.el: Πρέπει ακόμα να προλάβουμε το τρένο.
translations.sv: Vi måste fortfarande hinna med tåget.
translations.ja: まだ電車に乗らないといけない。

tokens.explanation: Personal pronoun, 1st person plural nominative; subject of the clause.
Modal auxiliary expressing obligation/necessity; finite present; selects a bare infinitive.
Definite article, accusative masculine; determiner of the noun 'Zug'.
Common noun; direct object of 'erreichen'.
Adverb; indicates 'still/yet', modifying the predicate (there is still time to catch it).
Lexical verb in bare infinitive (selected by the modal); here in the sense of 'to catch/reach' a train.

sentences.target: Er versucht seine Ziele zu erreichen.

translations.de: Er versucht seine Ziele zu erreichen.
translations.en: He tries to achieve his goals.
translations.it: Cerca di raggiungere i suoi obiettivi.
translations.ko: 그는 자신의 목표를 이루려고 노력하고 있다.
translations.zh-Hans: 他在努力实现自己的目标。
translations.yue: 佢喺努力達成自己嘅目標。
translations.pt: Ele está tentando alcançar seus objetivos.
translations.he: הוא מנסה להשיג את המטרות שלו.
translations.vi: Anh ấy đang cố gắng đạt được các mục tiêu của mình.
translations.nl: Hij probeert zijn doelen te bereiken.
translations.hi: वह अपने लक्ष्यों को हासिल करने की कोशिश कर रहा है.
translations.el: Προσπαθεί να πετύχει τους στόχους του.
translations.nb: Han prøver å nå målene sine.
translations.ro: El încearcă să își atingă obiectivele.
translations.da: Han prøver at nå sine mål.
translations.ja: 彼は目標を達成しようとしている。

tokens.explanation: Personal pronoun, 3rd person singular nominative; subject of the clause.
Finite main verb (present, 3sg); control verb that selects a 'zu' + infinitive complement.
Possessive determiner; modifies 'Ziele' and marks possession.
Plural common noun; object within the infinitival clause headed by 'erreichen'.
Infinitival particle; marks the non-finite verb form in the complement.
Infinitive lexical verb in the 'zu'-infinitive construction; denotes achieving/reaching the goals.

sentences.target: Ich kann das obere Regal nicht erreichen.
sentences.reading: /ɪç kan das ˈoːbəʁə ʁeˈɡaːl nɪçt ɛˈʁaɪ̯çən./

translations.de: Ich kann das obere Regal nicht erreichen.
translations.ipa: /ɪç kan das ˈoːbəʁə ʁeˈɡaːl nɪçt ɛˈʁaɪ̯çən./
translations.en: I can't reach the top shelf.
translations.es: No llego al estante de arriba.
translations.fr: Je n'arrive pas à atteindre l'étagère du haut.
translations.it: Non riesco a raggiungere lo scaffale in alto.
translations.ko: 맨 위 선반에 손이 닿지 않아.
translations.ru: Я не дотягиваюсь до верхней полки.
translations.pt: Não alcanço a prateleira de cima.
translations.vi: Tôi với không tới kệ trên cùng.
translations.ar: لا أستطيع الوصول إلى الرف العلوي.
translations.nl: Ik kan niet bij de bovenste plank.
translations.uk: Я не дістаю до верхньої полиці.
translations.hu: Nem érem el a felső polcot.
translations.hi: मैं ऊपर वाली शेल्फ तक नहीं पहुँच पाता हूँ.
translations.nb: Jeg når ikke upp til den øverste hyllen.
translations.id: Aku tidak bisa menjangkau rak paling atas.
translations.ro: Nu ajung la raftul de sus.
translations.da: Jeg kan ikke nå den øverste hylde.
translations.ja: 一番上の棚に手が届かない。

tokens.explanation: Personal pronoun, 1st person singular nominative; subject of the clause.
Modal auxiliary (present, finite) expressing ability; selects a bare infinitive.
Definite article, neuter accusative; determiner of 'Regal'.
Attributive adjective in positive degree; modifies 'Regal'.
Common noun; direct object of 'erreichen'.
Negation particle; negates the predicate.
Lexical verb in bare infinitive (selected by the modal); physical reaching of the object.

We still have to catch the train.
He tries to achieve his goals.
